Club.title: Club
Club.description: Represents a sports club managed by a user. This entity holds core information about the club, such as its name, logo, and contact details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Club entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who manages this club. (Relationship: User 1:N Club)

name.description: The official name of the club.

logoUrl.description: URL to the club's logo image.

address.description: The physical address of the club.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email for the club.

contactPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the club.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the club record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the club record was last updated.

Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a player associated with a sports club, including their personal and contact information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Player entity.

clubId.description: Reference to the Club this player belongs to. (Relationship: Club 1:N Player)

name.description: The full name of the player.

position.description: The primary playing position of the player (e.g., 'Forward', 'Midfielder', 'Defender', 'Goalkeeper').

status.description: The current status of the player (e.g., 'Active', 'Injured', 'On Loan', 'Inactive').

contactEmail.description: The contact email address of the player.

contactPhone.description: The contact phone number of the player.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the player record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the player record was last updated.

Coach.title: Coach
Coach.description: Represents a coach associated with a sports club, including their specialization and contact information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Coach entity.

clubId.description: Reference to the Club this coach belongs to. (Relationship: Club 1:N Coach)

name.description: The full name of the coach.

specialization.description: The area of expertise or specialization of the coach (e.g., 'Offensive Tactics', 'Goalkeeper Coach', 'Fitness Trainer').

status.description: The current status of the coach (e.g., 'Active', 'On Leave', 'Contract Ended').

contactEmail.description: The contact email address of the coach.

contactPhone.description: The contact phone number of the coach.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the coach record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the coach record was last updated.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a scheduled club activity, which can be either a match or a training session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

clubId.description: Reference to the Club this event belongs to. (Relationship: Club 1:N Event)

title.description: A descriptive title for the event (e.g., 'Vs. Eagles', 'Morning Practice').

description.description: An optional detailed description of the event or specific instructions.

eventDateTime.description: The date and time when the event is scheduled to occur.

location.description: The location where the event will take place.

opponent.description: The name of the opposing team, if the event is a match.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the event record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the event record was last updated.

MatchResult.title: MatchResult
MatchResult.description: Records the outcome and key details of a past match event, including scores and scorers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MatchResult entity.

clubId.description: Reference to the Club this match result belongs to. (Relationship: Club 1:N MatchResult)

eventId.description: Reference to the Event (which must be a 'Match' type) for which this result is recorded. (Relationship: Event 1:N MatchResult)

ourScore.description: The final score achieved by the club's team in the match.

opponentScore.description: The final score achieved by the opposing team in the match.

scorerIds.description: An array of Player IDs who scored goals in this match. (Relationship: Player N:N MatchResult via scorerIds)

notes.description: Optional notes or comments about the match performance or key moments.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the match result record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the match result record was last updated.

MembershipFee.title: MembershipFee
MembershipFee.description: Represents a financial obligation or fee owed by a specific player or coach for a given purpose (e.g., annual membership, uniform cost).

id.description: Unique identifier for the MembershipFee entity.

clubId.description: Reference to the Club this membership fee belongs to. (Relationship: Club 1:N MembershipFee)

name.description: A descriptive name for the fee (e.g., 'Annual Membership 2024', 'Uniform Fee').

description.description: Optional detailed description of what the fee covers.

amountDue.description: The total amount of money owed for this fee.

dueDate.description: The date by which this fee is expected to be paid.

status.description: The current payment status of the fee (e.g., 'Outstanding', 'Partially Paid', 'Paid', 'Overdue').

entityType.description: Indicates whether the fee is owed by a 'Player' or a 'Coach'.

entityId.description: Reference to the Player or Coach entity who owes this fee. (Relationship: Player/Coach 1:N MembershipFee)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the membership fee record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the membership fee record was last updated.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records an individual payment made by a player or coach towards a specific membership fee.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

clubId.description: Reference to the Club this payment belongs to. (Relationship: Club 1:N Payment)

membershipFeeId.description: Reference to the MembershipFee this payment is applied to. (Relationship: MembershipFee 1:N Payment)

payerType.description: Indicates whether the payment was made by a 'Player' or a 'Coach'.

payerId.description: Reference to the Player or Coach entity who made this payment. (Relationship: Player/Coach 1:N Payment)

amountPaid.description: The amount of money paid in this transaction.

paymentDate.description: The date and time when the payment was recorded.

method.description: The method used for the payment (e.g., 'Cash', 'Bank Transfer', 'Credit Card').

notes.description: Optional notes or comments related to the payment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the payment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the payment record was last updated.

definition.description: Represents a sports club managed by a specific user. This collection is user-owned. The `userId` field is present in the document and matches the `userId` in the path, ensuring Authorization Independence.
Players associated with a specific club. Each Player document includes the denormalized `userId` (owner of the club) and `clubId` for Authorization Independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the club.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club this player belongs to.

params.name: playerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the player.

definition.description: Coaches associated with a specific club. Each Coach document includes the denormalized `userId` (owner of the club) and `clubId` for Authorization Independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the club.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club this coach belongs to.

params.name: coachId
params.description: The unique identifier of the coach.

definition.description: Scheduled events (matches or training) for a specific club. Each Event document includes the denormalized `userId` (owner of the club) and `clubId` for Authorization Independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the club.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club this event belongs to.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

definition.description: Results for match events of a specific club. Each MatchResult document includes the denormalized `userId` (owner of the club), `clubId`, and `eventId` for Authorization Independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the club.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club this match result belongs to.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the event for which this result is recorded.

params.name: matchResultId
params.description: The unique identifier of the match result.

definition.description: Membership fees and other financial obligations related to a club's players or coaches. Each MembershipFee document includes the denormalized `userId` (owner of the club) and `clubId` for Authorization Independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the club.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club this membership fee belongs to.

params.name: membershipFeeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the membership fee.

definition.description: Individual payments made towards a specific membership fee. Each Payment document includes the denormalized `userId` (owner of the club), `clubId`, and `membershipFeeId` for Authorization Independence and simplified security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the club.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier of the club this payment belongs to.

params.name: membershipFeeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the membership fee this payment is applied to.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the payment.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to be secure, scalable, and highly debuggable by adhering strictly to the core design principles and mandates. The primary strategy employed is **Authorization Independence via Denormalization** and **Hierarchical Path-Based Ownership**.

All application data related to a user's clubs is nested directly under their unique user ID in the path: `/users/{userId}/clubs/{clubId}/...`. This leverages the provided security rule `match /users/{userId}/{document=**} { allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == userId; }` by ensuring that the `userId` from the path directly corresponds to the authenticated user's ID (`request.auth.uid`).

**Authorization Independence** is achieved by denormalizing the `userId` of the club's owner into every sub-document (Player, Coach, Event, MatchResult, MembershipFee, Payment). This means that a document like `/users/{userId}/clubs/{clubId}/players/{playerId}` will contain a `userId` field with the value `userId` (from the path), and a `clubId` field with the value `clubId` (from the path). This crucial design decision eliminates the need for expensive and complex `get()` calls in security rules to check parent document ownership. Rules can evaluate access directly on the `resource.data.userId` field or simply rely on the `userId` wildcard in the path, making them atomic, efficient, and easy to debug.

**QAPs (Queries are not Filters)** are inherently supported by this hierarchical structure and the single-user ownership model. When a user queries any collection under their specific `/users/{userId}/` path (e.g., `/users/abc/clubs` or `/users/abc/clubs/123/players`), the Firestore security rules automatically filter out any documents that do not belong to `request.auth.uid`. Since all documents within a user's branch belong to that user, any `list` operation will only return data that the authenticated user is authorized to see. This ensures that security is enforced by the structure and rules, not by client-side filtering that could expose unauthorized data.

**Structural Segregation** is maintained as all data under a `userId` path shares the same security posture: it's private to that `userId`. There is no mixing of public and private data within the same collection. **Access Modeling** is consistently applied using path-based ownership for private, user-owned, and nested data.

This design offers a clear, predictable, and robust security model that directly aligns with Firebase's best practices for Firestore security rules.
